mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, user_type, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, user_type, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{userType}, #{status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, user_type = #{userType}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission_code FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND rm.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND ur.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_type, m.permission_code, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.visible, m.status, m.sort, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND rm.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND ur.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 AND m.visible = 1 AND m.menu_type IN ('CATALOG', 'MENU') ORDER BY m.sort ASC, m.id ASC
